> se você fizer a história paralela do uvhash, esse grupo é melhor

content: Is doit!
What team would help with this?
I’ve been using
But I cnat make it past this part
Take increase max hp at all the blood pools
And also crimson brooch does literally nothing in this fight
You want scaling relics
And run Burial Grounds covenant
Should be enough if ur getting to this point
I’m really sorry what’s crimson brooch?
On who?
Helot and Faint
Crimson Brooch is the name of the first relic on ur bar
Got it thank you!
What does this mean,
So the first phase whenever he loses an hp bar he dispels all ur buffs

So instead of relics that enter the fight with effects (brooch and others) you want ones that are continuously useful (crit mistletoe) or ones that progressively gain power, or in another word, scale (guardian’s hand)
